mapper.sql: id, doctor_id, hospital_id, department_id, schedule_date, time_slot, total_count, remain_count, status, create_time
mapper.select: select from t_schedule order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_schedule set doctor_id = #{et.doctorId}, hospital_id = #{et.hospitalId}, department_id = #{et.departmentId}, schedule_date = #{et.scheduleDate}, time_slot = #{et.timeSlot}, total_count = #{et.totalCount}, remain_count = #{et.remainCount}, status = #{et.status}, create_time = #{et.createTime} where id = #{et.id}
